====Pokémon====
{{MissingInfo|1|java|scope=section}}
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Valerie
|pkmn=Spritzee
|type1=Fairy
|img=Valerie Spritzee.png
|epnum=XY073
|epname=A Fashionable Battle!
|vajp=Hitomi Nabatame
|vaen=Lisa Ortiz
|desc={{p|Spritzee}} is Valerie's first known Pokémon. It was first seen with Valerie and her Pokémon before the fashion show began. During the fashion show, it battled [[Sawyer]]'s {{p|Bagon}}. When Bagon launched a {{m|Dragon Breath}}, Spritzee was completely unaffected by the move. After easily dodging Bagon's {{m|Headbutt}} attacks using its agility, it defeated Bagon with Dazzling Gleam.

In ''[[XY074|Fairy-Type Trickery!]]'', Valerie chose Spritzee as her second and final Pokémon to battle {{Ash}} in his [[Laverre Gym]] battle. It defeated his {{AP|Fletchinder}} despite Fletchinder's supereffective attacks, but lost to {{AP|Hawlucha}} despite having a type advantage. It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY075|Rivals: Today and Tomorrow!]]''.

In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', it was seen watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with Valerie. In ''[[XY135|Rocking Kalos Defenses!]]'' and ''[[XY136|Forming a More Perfect Union!]]'', it helped destroy the [[Giant Rock]].

It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[XY140|Till We Compete Again!]]''.

Spritzee's known moves are {{m|Dazzling Gleam}}, {{m|Trick Room}}, {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Moonblast}}, and {{m|Light Screen}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Valerie
|pkmn=Sylveon
|type1=Fairy
|img=Valerie Sylveon.png
|epnum=XY073
|epname=A Fashionable Battle!
|vajp=Chinatsu Akasaki
|vaen=Erica Schroeder
|desc={{p|Sylveon}} was briefly seen in its first appearance with the other Pokémon when Valerie prepared for her fashion show.

In ''[[XY074|Fairy-Type Trickery!]]'', Sylveon battled {{Ash}} in his [[Laverre Gym]] battle. It proved to be a powerful opponent, using its ribbons to take control of its round against [[Ash's Fletchinder]] and dealing a close range Fairy Wind. However, it was eventually defeated by Fletchinder's supereffective {{m|Steel Wing}}.

In ''[[XY132|A Towering Takeover!]]'', it was seen watching [[Lysandre]]'s broadcast from [[Lumiose City]] along with Valerie.

Sylveon's known moves are {{m|Disarming Voice}}, {{m|Fairy Wind}}, and {{m|Giga Impact}}.}}
